series_metadata.series_description: Records of data processing policies including those covering access and security, systems development, data retention and disposition, and data ownership

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced. Then review by State Archives prior to disposal. (See OCC-PP-02) ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced. Then review by State Archives prior to disposal. (See OCC-PP-02), Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Erase
